Classic Polish Chocolate Cake ("Murzynka")
Ingredients:
250 g (1 cup) sugar

250 g (1 cup) margarine or unsalted butter

3 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa powder

5 tablespoons water

2 teaspoons vanilla extract (optional)

3 eggs

1.5 cups (about 190 g) all-purpose flour

2 teaspoons baking powder

Optional chocolate glaze:
100 g (3.5 oz) dark chocolate

2 tablespoons milk

1 tablespoon butter

Instructions:
Prepare the chocolate base:

In a saucepan, combine sugar, margarine/butter, cocoa, and water.

Heat gently, stirring until everything is melted and smooth.

Set aside and let cool slightly.

Separate the mixture:

Pour about ½ cup (100 ml) of the chocolate mixture into a separate bowl and set it aside — this will be used as the glaze later.

Make the batter:

Once the remaining mixture has cooled, mix in the eggs (one at a time).

Add vanilla extract if using.

Stir in flour and baking powder and mix until smooth.

Bake:

Pour the batter into a greased and floured loaf or rectangular cake pan.

Bake at 180°C (350°F) for about 40–50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.

Glaze:

While the cake cools, warm the reserved chocolate mixture (or melt chocolate with milk and butter) until smooth.

Pour over the cooled cake.

Cara.. esse jogo tem uma proposta muito boa, muito boa mesmo. Eu curti demais a pegada que ele tem mas infelizmente ele teve um lançamento extremamente precoce, o jogo atualmente tá bem longe de estar completo.
Ela veio com uma proposta que visivelmente é boa, mas quando você joga você vê as falhas e o quanto falta pra realmente estar entretivo. 

FALHAS:

O jogo já lançou faz 2 meses praticamente e vem com muitas falhas, vou listar algumas que EU experienciei:
- O netcode do jogo é completamente mal feito.
- Não há crossplay. (O que limita muito em jogar com mais pessoas/amigos)
- Muitas inconsistências com a bola 
- Ser goleiro nesse jogo é sempre um 50/50.. o jogo que decide se você pega a bola ou não, ou seja, muita das vezes buga e passa pelo personagem.
- Não tem um sistema próprio de amizades no jogo
- Não tem sistema de reports e nem penalização em sair durante uma partida.
- A ranked do jogo tem um sistema completamente falho. Você não sofre punição em perder muitas partidas.. se você alcança um rank você nunca cairá dele, você o conquista e permanece dele, só tendo a opção de permanecer nele ou subir de rank
- Eles negligenciaram completamente a jogabilidade no mouse e teclado no lançamento (e até os dias de hoje), sendo assim, tendo um design de jogabilidade extremamente mal feito.

E entre muitos outros problemas que você VAI experienciar nesse jogo enquanto a Sloclap não prestar atenção, o jogo está morrendo basicamente.


LADOS POSITIVOS:

- Muito divertido de jogar com os amigos
- Recomendo altamente que jogue casualmente, assim você se divertirá um pouco mais.
- Proposta muito boa... a ideia central do jogo é original e tem muito potencial se for bem desenvolvida (Se a Sloclap não vacilar)
- Gameplay viciante, mesmo com falhas, você sempre ta querendo jogar mais uma
- Alto potencial competitivo: se o estúdio investir nos acertos, pode se tornar um jogo sólido pra cenário competitivo, mas atualmente está fora de questão isso com o meta atual do jogo.

This game has been steadily dying since its launch. The only people left are either people with hundreds of hours or newcomers just having their first couple matches. There is absolutely no skill based matchmaking. I have seen people rank up to Master I playing with people of Bronze skill when the server was empty. If you are an experienced player, solo matchmaking is a nightmare as you won't get matched with people of your skill, neither in your team or opposing team.

Honestly, they should just rip the band-aid off and make the game free to play. For me, sloclap had a special place because I loved playing Sifu, but the way they have gone with REMATCH made me lose all the trust I had. I REALLY don't recommend getting this game, only maybe in the future if they bring it to a good state and make it free to play. I pre-ordered this game and had my round of good fun but it is not the time to experience this game right now.

[b]WARNING: The game is now plagued by cheaters having super-speed (think X-Men Quicksilver) despite the game using invasive kernel-level anti-cheat, and to make it worse there is no option to report them. Since the early 2000s I've never seen an online game without a function to report cheaters or grifters.

The only way to "report" a cheater right now is by joining the devs' Discord server and providing them with your phone contact. I'm pretty sure this violates Steam's ToS and should be grounds for a refund regardless of playtime or date of purchase, I will inform myself on that matter.

Example of the cheaters in question: https://www.reddit.com/r/Rematch/comments/1lyzcar/cheater_possibly_boosting/[/b]


Really can't recommend it, as much as I like the concept.

You've probably heard about the server issues, lag, etc. so I won't mention that. I will mention only the game's issues when it does work. And while the game itself is not horrible, it's the sum of multiple horrible parts that a good concept cannot save. These are the most egregious problems I've encountered so far.


[b]Controls are bad to a baffling extent[/b]: Whether you go with Gamepad or KBM the controls will be painfully bad.

First I went with KBM and while everything else works great, aiming is pretty much impossible. Aiming works by one-time mouse movements when you shoot akin to melee strikes in games like Chivalry, but much much worse. It's basically chaos and it won't be consistent.

Then I went with gamepad and dear heavens, it's [b]bad[/b]. You have unused keys (for example, with the ball the Y key is never used) yet some actions with the ball are the combination of 3 different keys, like A+X+RB. Why? You have unused single-press inputs, why do you need to combine 3 for a simple action?

The game states that you can rebind if you pick the "custom" preset but no such preset exists. Maybe it'll be implemented later, but as it stands it's too messy to be played properly.


[b]Some of the most egregious monetization I've seen:[/b] I know microtransactions are never good, but there are bad ones and there are "what the actual hell did I just see" bad. This game, on top of being a full-priced game with a season pass, uses currency for pretty much everything. Even having beard is an mtx (you can have a stubble, but for beard you need currency). Some hairstyles are even exclusive to paid currency.

That's just the beginning of it though. Currency drops much slower than in other games. I've made 3 matches and got the grand total of zero of even the free currency. Maybe it only drops on wins, maybe it takes X matches to get anything, but it's definitely slower than other games with similar monetization.

On top of that, when you're customizing your character or uniform, there's a "Buy currency" button next to the other shortcuts on the bottom regardless of what you're doing, even if it's just changing colors. That's of course on top of the Store and Season Pass tabs in the main menu. It's so on the nose it's not even funny. I had respect for Sloclap after Absolver and Sifu so it's sad to see them cranking the throttle all the way from zero to Ubisoft all of a sudden.


[b]Servers aren't working and there are no bots/single-player matches[/b]: As I've mentioned, I won't go into detail with the server problems making the game unplayable at times. You have other reviews going into that in detail. However what I will go into detail is that a game with unstable servers [b]needs[/b] to have offline options to be playable at all. 

Bots/offline play should be in every game of this kind just on the basis that without them the game will die as it loses playerbase (nobody wants to spend 10 minutes waiting for matchmaking). However even in the present state, if you want to play it in a stable way you can't because there is no way to play against AI.

So all in all, it's a good concept with an implementation that's the sum of multiple terrible parts, and the result is just not enjoyable no matter how much you try to make it so.

EDIT: I can confirm neither matches nor wins give currency. Currency is only acquired on levelling up or the season pass. I have gotten most from the latter but as soon as the season pass ticket from the Pro version wears out the currency drops will likely be Warthunder level. Not acceptable in a game of this price point.

REMATCH is an absolute blast and a breath of fresh air for longtime Rocket League players craving something both familiar and refreshingly different. Its fast-paced gameplay and tight mechanics make every match feel intense and rewarding, reigniting the competitive spirit that’s been missing for many. However, for REMATCH to truly thrive and build a lasting community, crossplay must be prioritized and implemented as soon as possible. The player base is eager to connect across platforms and play with their buddies. Adding a club or clan feature would also take the experience to the next level, allowing friends and teams to organize, compete, and represent together something that could feel more unique.

In the beginning, I loved this game, now I've been 3 weeks without playing it and don't miss it at all...
Today I came to play, I ended up playing one game and alt-f4ing as soon as it ended.

As soon as you get to a semi-high rank (I'm currently Diamond), the game is unplayable for people over 45 ping such as me. I live in Portugal and have a 1Gb internet connection. Rarely do I find a game with <45 ping. Due to this, I always have no priority in 50/50s which results in 0 fun.

Besides this, the game has numerous netcode issues, including the rubber banding and exploits that people consider "dribbling" and the devs pretend not to know about.

Will wait to see if netcode improvements come, until then, I cannot recommend the game in its current state.

I truly only leave reviews for games i love and am fully vested in, but this is ridiculous to have the same bugs and network issues from 2 months of beta testing present at release. Yes im 3 days early from official release but if they can fix these issues in 3 days they could have fixed them months ago. You cant have a sports game, especially one built on split second inputs survive in this day and age with awful network issues. My very first game i loaded in, all input decided to just vanish. Im talking M&k and Controller. As if no keybindings were present. Second game, playing goalie and i watch the opponent and the ball skip across the field and eventually into the net... Immediately turned it off. $50 bucks for day 1 issues is frustrating in any genre, but to lose a game due to this and this will only build up and force people to just stop playing. This game can be a literal goldmine if these simple issues can get fixed.

I am still going to upvote because there is plenty of time left to fix these issues, but they need to act fast and accordingly. Would hate to see this game die when it is such a beautiful and fun concept and experience... when it works as intended.

--Update--
First crash happened after 8 games played. Literally never crashed during the beta. Game goes into full release and get my first crash. Make it make sense.

[h1] DESCASO COM QUEM JOGA NO MOUSE E TECLADO [/h1]

O primeiro beta do REMATCH foi perfeito, o jogo estava funcional e foi aonde eu tive menos problemas técnicos, a unica coisa ruim era o mapeamento de teclas e o fato de você não poder mapear os botões.
O segundo beta eles melhoraram 100% o mapeamento dos botões ficando bem mais facil a jogabilidade para quem joga no mouse e teclado porem com um bug nos passes, que você mirava no ponto especifico mas o passe saia para os lados ou para trás sem sentido nenhum(Varias pessoas reportaram o MESMO problema na jogabilidade do mouse e teclado no discord oficial do REMATCH durante o segundo beta e nada de arrumar).
Agora para o jogo final tinha feito a pré venda por jogar 30 horas no primeiro beta e me divertido horrores mas pela a minha experiencia na versão final esta mais desastrosa que o ultimo beta. O MESMO PROBLEMA DE PASSES PARA QUEM JOGA NO MOUSE E TECLADO. É papo de você esta jogando com goleiro e for tocar para frente. MIRANDO para frente com o mouse e o goleiro tocar para trás assim fazendo gol contra, isso acaba com a experiencia. E para completar as cagadas já tive 4 crashs, e não tive nenhum problema de crash durante os betas.

[b] Esse jogo tem um puta potencial mas pelo visto o foco agora da produtora é apenas em quem joga no controle.. Esperar arrumarem esses problemas e comprar em uma promoção [/b]

EDIT: As much as it pains me to edit this review, but the servers and bugs got worse since the launch of the game. On Europe Servers, there wasn't much lag at launch. Now there's constant lag for quite some time now and with the first "big patch" there's one of the most annoying lighting bugs that I've ever encountered in a multiplayer game. Sometimes, there's a light source outside of the field that just flares up and blinds you until you look at it. The ball teleports back and forth sometimes and I had at least 2 goals as a goalkeeper, that were completely out of my control through lack and bad netcode. My connection is stable in every other game, so it's not that. I love the core gameplay, but the technical side and the servers are not up to speed.

It's very buggy so far, but the core gameplay is incredible. I wish sloclap nothing but the best for this gem and hope that any server problems and weird bugs can get sorted out asap.

Put about 30 hours in total across the betas and playtests, and let me just say that this is an absolutely incredible competitive game. My friends and I come from a long history of a lot of other competitive games, from counter strike to rocket league, and I have to say this is up there as one of my favorites. Its fast, tight controls make for super awesome moments and highlights, and it never ceases to stop giving those moments. Whenever someone makes a sick goal, we all would cheer and carry on and that is what its all about. The game looks good, plays good, and is good.

As of now, Ill say its a solid 8/10. Only reason it isnt higher is the server issues that were present in there betas are still causing issues. Lag and latency variations in these types of games really ruins the fun! Other than that, game is incredible.

I've since edited my review to not recommend this game.

I do think this is an amazing game, it is so enjoyable to play especially with a group of friends. In fact, I will continue to put hours into this game, however I do not think the game should be paid access.

This game already suffers from network and server bugs, and that, annoyingly, hasn't been resolved since the BETA. This is a competitive game that needs a bigger playerbase, and that will only ever come from turning this into F2P.

It is an enjoyable game for those wondering, by no means is it bad, however I fear negative reviews may be the only way to communicate to the devs what we need.

I waited so long for Rematch. I played both playtests and they were insanely good — far better than I ever expected. I spent over 15 hours just in the playtests, and based on those experiences, I pre-ordered the game with full confidence. But what we got in the final release? Not even close.

The final version feels like a completely different (and much worse) game. The controls are awful — unresponsive and clunky. The players can’t even pass the ball properly. Most of the time, you’re just running up and down the field with no sense of purpose or flow. There’s no finesse, no strategy, just pure frustration.

The playtests showed so much potential, and it’s heartbreaking to see how badly the final game turned out. I don’t know what changed, but this is not what we were promised.

There are two big issues right now that completely ruins the game:

1. The game is filled with cheaters and exploits. 
2. The game has fake ball physics.

The game has no report feature. For a multiplayer only game this is pretty absurd. If your game has a cheater or someone abusing exploits, well you're just going to have to wait it out.

This game is also not like Rocket League at all. Rocket League has ball physics, this game does not. The ball is instead tied to the player's animation. This is why the ball constantly goes through players, why your goalie can't catch a ball, or why your tackle goes through the player and the ball but does nothing.

The desync and poor netcode makes this even worse. Although they have improved this since launch.

The game itself is really fun but at some point you start questioning yourself what is even the point.

I’ve played a lot of football games over the years, but Rematch hits different. It’s not about licenses or realism—this is pure, fast-paced, 5v5 arcade action, and it’s absolutely addictive.

The controls feel tight, the gameplay is all skill-based (no pay-to-win, no player stats), and every match is a mix of chaos, tactics, and highlight-reel moments. Want to slide-tackle someone into the wall? You can. Want to pull off a last-second bicycle kick? You can do that too.

What I love most is how there are no fouls, no offsides, no stoppages—just non-stop momentum. It’s pick-up-and-play friendly but still has the depth to reward smart teamwork and positioning. Whether you're solo queueing or playing with friends, every round feels like a proper battle.

Pros:
✅ Super smooth movement and animations
✅ Manual ball control makes skill really matter
✅ Roles actually feel different: keeper, defender, attacker
✅ Gorgeous enclosed arenas + great sound design
✅ Fast queue times, great optimization

Os desenvolvedores poderiam ter caprichado mais nesse jogo, diminuir o ritmo, tirar esse meta pebolim, deixar a gente jogar futebol de verdade mesmo, mas infelizmente os caras são burros demais. 
Nas primeiras semanas eu dei uma nota positiva pra esse jogo na esperança que fossem melhorar todos esses problemas, mas passaram-se os meses, e o jogo continuou do mesmo jeito e até piorou em alguns aspectos, então não tem o que fazer.

Positiv (+):

+ Viel Spielspaß vorhanden: Trotz der aktuellen Probleme macht das Gameplay Freude und fesselt.
+ Tastenbelegung anpassbar


Negativ (-):

- Noch laggy und buggy: Performance-Probleme und Fehler treten aktuell noch häufig auf.
- Regelmäßige Abstürze: Das Spiel stürzt leider immer wieder ab.
- Kein Crossplay (noch): Aktuell ist kein plattformübergreifendes Spielen möglich (soll aber nachgeliefert werden).

Fazit: Rematch ist im Grunde ein gutes Spiel, abgesehen von den Bugs, Lags und Abstürzen bietet es viel Spielspaß. Nur im Solo-Queue können die Mitspieler einen schnell zur Weißglut treiben. Em meados de 2009 ou 2010, lá estava eu: um guri com tempo de sobra, internet via rádio (200 kbps) e o sonho de ser a lenda dos gramados virtuais. O jogo? United Football, da Staggan. Meu nick? MaxiLopez16.
Faz tanto tempo que não lembro todos os times pelos quais passei, mas alguns ficaram marcados na memória:
•	RANGERS (MaxiLopez16RANGERS)
•	CLASH (MaxiLopez16CLASH)
•	STARS (STARSxMaxiLopez16) – rápida passagem
•	TIGERS (MaxiLopez16Tigers) – time que criei

Agora, sobre o jogo:
Os anos passaram. Vieram FIFAs, PES, gráficos de última geração, física realista, modos carreira... Mas aquela sensação visceral, rápida, quase caótica do futebol dos cabeçudos, nunca mais reencontrei.

Até agora.


Ao jogar Rematch, foi como abrir um portal no tempo. A mesma essência arcade, o mesmo frenesi de partidas rápidas. Tudo com uma roupagem moderna, polida, responsiva.
Não é só nostalgia — Rematch é, de fato, divertido. Ele resgata aquela pureza do futebol online que não depende de realismo, mas de ritmo, reflexo e carisma. O JOGO TEM ALMA!
Se você viveu a era de United Football, vai se sentir em casa. E se não viveu... talvez seja hora de entender por que tantas crianças com internet a 200kbps eram felizes.



(EDITADO 17/06/2025) - ALGUMAS OBSERVAÇÕES:

- Durante algumas horas de gameplay, notei poucos bugs... porém o lag/desync tá complicado, mas é de se esperar, pois o jogo é novo.

- O jogo só está crashando para quem tem PC mediano/ruim. Testei em um PC ruim e o game trava logo no início.

- Poderia ter um sistema de cartão amarelo igual ao UF, onde, quando o carrinho acerta em cheio, o jogador toma um yellow card e fica 5s sem conseguir correr (andando apenas).

- Ok, é legal... mas esse lance da bola não sair ficou um pouco "Rocket Leaguezado", e a mecânica de fazer gol acabou ficando muito "monótona" (se o goleiro for bom tu não faz gol "normal" de jeito NENHUM). Então precisará ser balanceada, pois ser goleiro é "fácil", porém a defesa quebra um pouco quando tentam fazer gol de rebote usando a barreira. Acredito que deveria existir um modo sem barreira.

- Quase ninguém quer ser goleiro, né? Então (igual ao UF, novamente) poderia haver as posições para escolher logo ao entrar na partida, e, se ninguém escolher o goleiro, poderia entrar um BOT (pelo menos no gol).

- Poderia ter mais opções de customização (cabelos, chuteiras, etc.), mas para começo está OK.

- Ainda não joguei no controle, porém a gameplay no teclado está "difícil". Às vezes estou correndo e quero roubar a bola, mas acabo dando um carrinho sem querer. O passe ainda está com problema no mouse — eles precisam corrigir isso.

(EDITADO 07/11/2025) - O JOGO MORREU - BRUTAL
Infelizmente a empresa não teve tanto carinho com o jogo que tinha um potencial gigantesco. O começo foi divertido, agora o jogo encontra-se abandonado. É o que sobra para os betas.

🏆 Valoración: 10/10

REMATCH, desarrollado por Sloclap, aporta una nueva visión de los juegos deportivos al combinar acción dinámica con una profunda cooperación en equipo. En lugar de buscar el realismo, el juego ofrece intensos partidos de 5 contra 5 en los que cada jugador controla a un único personaje desde una perspectiva en tercera persona. No hay faltas, fueras de juego ni saques de esquina, sino pura diversión futbolística.

🎮 Jugabilidad: Football Reimagined
REMATCH se centra en las habilidades individuales dentro de un entorno de equipo. Cada partido dura unos 6 minutos, con equipos de 3 a 5 jugadores. Los jugadores controlan a un personaje, cambiando de posición -incluido el portero- a lo largo del partido. Las reglas tradicionales, como las faltas y los fueras de juego, desaparecen, lo que da lugar a una acción trepidante e ininterrumpida.

Los controles son precisos: los jugadores apuntan y realizan pases o disparos manualmente, lo que exige una coordinación y unos reflejos excelentes. Los partidos se disputan en recintos cerrados, lo que permite jugadas creativas como rebotar el balón en las paredes.

🌍 Mundo de Juego: Un futuro utópico
Ambientado en el año 2065, REMATCH se desarrolla en un mundo que ha sufrido transformaciones ecológicas y sociales. Los estadios están vinculados temáticamente a diversas formas de energía renovable. Visualmente, el juego mezcla elementos del impresionismo francés con el estilo artístico de títulos como Breath of the Wild.

🎨 Estética y sonido: Energía con estilo
El juego destaca por sus gráficos coloridos y estilizados que son claros y visualmente atractivos. Las animaciones de los personajes son fluidas y la física de las bolas es realista, lo que aumenta la inmersión. El sonido y la música responden dinámicamente a la intensidad del partido, elevando la experiencia emocional.

🧩 Personalización y progresión
REMATCH ofrece una amplia personalización de los personajes, desde los trajes hasta las animaciones de celebración de los goles. El sistema de progresión desbloquea nuevos objetos cosméticos, lo que anima a seguir jugando. Es importante destacar que la ausencia de mecánicas de pago por ganar garantiza un entorno competitivo justo centrado en la habilidad del jugador.

🧠 Reflexiones finales
REMATCH redefine lo que puede ser un juego de deportes, combinando acción intensa con trabajo estratégico en equipo. Con su innovadora jugabilidad, su estética distintiva y su diseño inclusivo, ofrece una experiencia única en el panorama de los juegos deportivos. A mí personalmente, me trae recuerdos de cuando veía Galactic Football de niño, un espectáculo lleno de energía, espíritu de equipo y visión deportiva futurista.

🏆 Valoración: 10/10
REMATCH fusiona la pasión por el fútbol con un enfoque moderno de los videojuegos. Con su dinámica de juego, su sólida mecánica de equipo y su identidad visual única, se gana una puntuación perfecta.

Rematch fait partie des jeux surnotés.

Oui, le principe est plutôt novateur, en principe c'est cool, on enchaine les parties, c'est plaisant à jouer.

Mais l'exécution du jeu est actuellement dans un état tout à fait catastrophique. 

En pagaille : 
- La majorité des bugs de la beta 2 sont présents. Les 2 seuls que je n'ai pas rencontrés sont le joueur qui ne peut pas bouger, et le joueur "fantôme" (qui ne pouvait pas interagir avec le ballon)
- Il peut maintenant arriver que lorsqu'on engage, le ballon soit passé à l'adversaire plutôt qu'au joueur derrière.
- Les lags vont tout flinguer si ce n'est pas vite résolu. Le ballon qui se téléporte, disparait, traverse les joueurs ou le gardien (alors qu'il a l'animation de prise de balle)
- Les crashs toujours présents, ça se voit en match. Une équipe qui gagne et qui d'un seul coup perd 2 joueurs, bah on sait d'où ça vient.
- Le choix de considérer la souris comme un joystick pour les Taps, alors que cela va à l'encontre de toute ergonomie (ça marchait très bien sur la beta 1 avec le clavier)


Sachez également que le jeu est très clairement un F2P camouflé, que ce soit en termes de microtransactions, mais surtout dans sa progression extrêmement lente.

Maintenant, est-ce que tout ce que j'ai énoncé peut être corrigé, bien sûr, mais est-ce que ce le sera ? Sous combien de temps ?

Ah ! Et il n'y a pas de roadmap, alors que c'est une early access, donc reste plus qu'à parier.

-----------------------
- Petite mise à jour de l'évaluation après presque 2 mois d'existence du jeu.

Est-ce que je maintiens mon avis négatif, oui, et même encore plus.
En bientôt 2 mois, 1 mise à jour, qui a apporté beaucoup de bug sur l'interaction avec le ballon.
Les problèmes de tap en clavier souris sont toujours non résolus.
L'absence de fix et de mise à jour a fait descendre drastiquement le nombre de joueurs, résultat, des temps de matchmaking multipliés par 15-20.(environ 2 min pour du 4v4), pour un match de 6min, avec un nombre de troll en augmentation. Cela donne un rendement temps/plaisir assez proche du néant.
Ce même matchmaking qui matchera des joueurs full team, contre 4 random. Donc, vous serez piégé entre anti-jeu et troll, des 2 côtés.
La qualité des serveurs misérables. Avoir des balles qui se téléportent, un joueur qui ne réagit pas à cause de la latence, on n'est pourtant pas 60 dans la partie.

Bref, c'est rude pour un jeu qui avait du potentiel.
-----------------------
Edit du 17-12-2025. Maj avec l'arrivée de la saison 2.
On va désinstaller hein, je crois que c'est fini. Le pass est ridicule, et les serveurs encore pire. 
Je vais juste arrêter de me faire du mal avant les fêtes.

Edited 9/25/2025: Somehow the game has gotten significantly worse, even though it wasn't in a great shape anyway. Move priority is ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ atrocious when defending. Want to clear the ball with a header or volley on a cross into your own box? Get used to attacking players phasing through you or simply jumping higher for no reason other than priority that comes down to a coin flip. Want to pass the ball? Be ready for a hitbox 5x bigger than your actual opponent to somehow deflect the ball. Want to play on controller? Too bad, your controller randomly might just stop working mid match and you can only play M&K, even though when you back out to the menu your controller works fine. Oh and hope you didn't like anything in a previous battle pass, it's impossible to interact with having gone by, to really lean into the FOMO trend of modern gaming. Was really hoping that Season 1 would actually feel like the game would actually be in a state appropriate for launch. Seems that isn't the case. Uninstalling and hoping the game somehow makes a miraculous recovery, but at this point I'm annoyed I wasted money on this game.

Somehow the game just seems to be getting in a worse state over time. Not sure if it is the fact that people that actually played as a team are some of the 85%+ that have stopped playing since launch and all that are left are Ronaldo Jrs or what, but between that and consistently bad net code, poor progression, lack of crossplay, stiff mechanics that with each tweak get worse, I just can't recommend the game. I want to. I love what it is going for. Not what it is.

Rematch is a fast-paced 3v3 and 5v5 online sports brawler, where players tackle, dash, and fight for control of a glowing ball in futuristic arenas. It plays like a mix of Rocket League, Windjammers, and dodgeball.

I tested it extensively on the Steam Deck OLED, and the performance is surprisingly good even in full 5v5 matches:

🎮 Recommended Settings (Balance):
FXAA (TAA looks worse, TSR hurts FPS)
Motion Blur: Off
Textures: Low
Shadows: Medium (makes a big visual difference)
Post-Processing: Medium
Everything else: Low or Disabled
With these, I averaged around 55–60 FPS, and it still looked good.
On lowest settings, you can get up to 90 FPS, but the visuals suffer a lot.

Currently there seems to be some issues with online play, I get frequent disconnects, hopefully that gets fixed.
Full controller support works perfectly
Matches are short, intense, and perfect for handheld gaming

Overall, Rematch is an awesome fit for the Steam Deck, and it's shaping up to be a great pick-up-and-play experience. If you enjoy high-energy multiplayer games keep this one on your radar.

Check out my video review here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QC_masflB7Y

peak football game

EDIT: People complaining about server times must be queuing from Mars.

Still Better Than EAs SLOP

Monetisation: I understand people might disagree with there being a battlepass. This can litreally be avoided you can unlock cosmetic items without paying money, just play the game, Ronaldiniho is the only item I’ve seen in the store locked behind a paywall. Which is genuinely understandable considering license costs etc.

Bugs: Yes for sure there is desync but not as badly as some people are saying. Think some people tend to not read dev pre cautions such as deleting the runtime folder when it comes to crashes. Yes it still crashes but not nearly as much. 
Biggest bug issue IMO is players having the game crash after a goal is scored which seems to happen mostly in 5v5 it’s not constant but it’s common enough to be annoying and lead to a loss due to being a player down. Netcode changes and server to client sync should be their number 1 priority going forward. There was a big issue with opponents getting the ball for kickoff after scoring a goal this appears to be fixed or atleast heavily stemmed 

Teamplay: For the love of god pass the ball and look to build with your team, don’t get me wrong attempt some solo plays but 9/10 you should be looking to setup your team and create the space. This game heavily exploits space and team passing you can blitz teams easily with good passing

Cheese: keepers are getting better at reading shots of the backwall but majority of the time get caught out if they go for a double, I understand it’s a mechanic but even when Me and friends have scored this we have hated doing so and sometimes only do it in retaliation.

Final thoughts: Honestly, Its improved massively since the beta tests IMO, still some slight issues but nothing game breaking IMO. Id still rather give Sloclap the money for a Non Scripted football title than ever give EA a cent again, ♥♥♥♥ EA, Hopefully with some polish the game will reach the standards that people expect, but trust me the Sauce is there its brilliant and really fun. Well Done Sloclap youve done well.

About time someone took a stab at Konami and EA instead of letting them monopolize the market when it comes to football titles outside of football manager

REMATCH to gra, która wciąga od pierwszego meczu i nie wypuszcza z rąk przez długie godziny. Idealna dla fanów rywalizacji, którzy cenią sobie szybkie tempo, sprawiedliwy matchmaking i możliwość natychmiastowego rewanżu – bo przecież następnym razem to ja wygram!

🎮 Rozgrywka:
Prosta do nauczenia, ale trudna do opanowania – dokładnie tak, jak powinno być. Każda runda to dynamiczna walka nerwów, refleksu i strategii. Idealna, by wskoczyć na 15 minut... i zostać na 2 godziny.

🎧 Grafika i dźwięk:
Stylowa, minimalistyczna oprawa świetnie pasuje do klimatu gry, a soundtrack podkręca atmosferę napięcia i adrenaliny. Efekty dźwiękowe są czytelne i pomagają w orientacji w meczu.

🤝 Multiplayer:
Zaskakująco dobrze zoptymalizowany. Szybkie dobieranie graczy, brak większych lagów, uczciwa gra i system zachęcający do rewanżu – to wszystko sprawia, że gra żyje. Świetna także ze znajomymi – szczególnie jeśli lubicie sobie „odgryźć się” po porażce 😉

📈 Progres i rozwój:
System postępów jest uczciwy – nie trzeba płacić, by czuć progres. Gra daje satysfakcję z samej rywalizacji, a każde zwycięstwo naprawdę cieszy.

🎯 Podsumowanie:
REMATCH to perełka wśród szybkich, rywalizacyjnych gier. Jeśli szukasz tytułu, który pozwoli Ci się zmierzyć z innymi w dynamicznych rundach i nie znudzisz się po godzinie – to bierz w ciemno.

⭐ Ocena: 9/10
„Wygrywasz – jesteś legendą. Przegrywasz – bierzesz rewanż.”

The game is very enjoyable, but this negative review is to encourage people not to buy the battle pass because of it's questionable progression speed.

If I pay money on a game's cosmetics I want to actually *get* those cosmetics without having to spend well over 70 hours grinding. It takes on average 3-5 matches to gain 1 battle pass point, which is around 40 minutes of real time.

I still have well over 20 tiers left despite this (81/105), meaning the game is expecting a dedication of well over 100 hours of playtime to unlock the content you've paid for by the pass - yet still labelled "BETA".

It's actively killed the fun of playing because instead of choosing the mode I want to play (3v3 - there is STILL no ranked version) I am forced to play ranked 5v5 simply to have short queues to progress the ONLY way to unlock new things in the game.

I'm convinced sometimes my XP doesn't count too, which only adds to the frustration when I complete 5 matches to see I don't even have any points to spend.

It's definitely made me realise I won't be spending any money on any future passes, as I got this one for "free" with the Pro Edition. If they can fix this progression, I may consider a pass in the future, but it's simply far too slow for anyone who doesn't no-life the game to complete.

🅷🅾🅽🅴🆂🆃 🆁🅴🅼🅰🆃🅲🅷 🆁🅴🆅🅸🅴🆆

Cosmetics...

Most games today push there wacky cosmetics in your face which causes people to eventually get sick of them. 

This game takes a unique approach to this, You can play to earn your cosmetics there is gold coins in game & you earn them from playing in normal modes or ranked. 

Battle Pass

There is 3 stages to this battle pass, there is "Pre-Season, Qualifiers & Championship." The rewards you get from this is player banners, clothing, more forms of currency & from what I see as of writing this different types of arenas. 

Gameplay....

Controls are super simple after 20 minutes of playing so the skill gap on this game won't be insane. The passing & crossing feels super clean & shooting is very satisfying even when curling the ball into the top right! 

Being in goal isn't annoying at all I'm more of a CB in most football games but I think I may have to be a GK in this game, I honestly prefer being in goal all the time. 

3rd person is a very good choice that they have chosen to do.

Cons...

So in the beta there was some delay with the GK saving the ball & not to mention when you have the ball in your hands sometimes people can header it out of your hands which is 1000% broke. 

Review Summery...

There isn't even much bad things about this game. I'm really enjoying it & the bad things about this game doesn't really impact the game at all.

"시푸"도 쉬운 게임은 아니었지만, 온라인 축구 게임을 유료로 만드니까 좀 쉽게 만들겠지 생각했는데 대차게 예상이 빗나갔네요. 룰이 아주 간단한 걸 제외하면 아케이드 스포츠 게임에 기대할 만한 보정이나 쉬운 컨트롤은 많이 반영되어 있지는 않은 것 같습니다. 기본적인 슈팅이나 수비, 태클 등의 조작법이야 간단하지만, 원하는 방향으로 패스를 하는 것부터도 쉽지 않더라고요.

연습해서 잘 해 봐야지 하는 것도 어느 정도지, 팀 게임이고 실점으로 이어지니 눈치가 많이 보입니다. 랭크전이 아닌데도 게임 좀 안 풀린다고 길지도 않은 시간에 나가버리더라고요. 베타를 여러 번 하기도 했고 얼리 액세스 기간이라 능숙한 분들이 많으신지, 발매 당일에도 수준 차이가 많이 나긴 합니다. 정식 발매일에 일반판과 게임패스로 플레이 하는 분들도 합류해야 숨이 좀 트이려나 싶네요.

축구 게임은 워낙 마나아 층들이 있으니 컨트롤 멋드러지게 하면서 즐기면, 한 판도 짧고 그래픽도 깔끔해서 재밌을 것 같습니다. 다만 저 같은 허접한 입문자들은 튜토리얼 하나하나 정독하고 숙지해서 들어가도 적응이 쉬운 게임은 아니니 감안해서 시작하셔야 할 것 같습니다. 연습 메뉴에 일일 판수 제한해서라도 AI 대전도 넣어주면 좋겠어요.

EL JUEGO DECEPCIÓN: Lo que pudo ser y no fue.

Al principio le dejé una reseña positiva con la esperanza de que lo fuesen arreglando con el tiempo, empecé jugando al juego desde la primera beta la cual en aquel momento fue una experiencia positiva, agradable, Un juego que te recompensaba la precisión, el juego en equipo, la buena sensación que te daba marcar o parar un gol. Las siguientes betas fueron empeorando más y más, la netcode desastrosa, un desync que hace que el juego sea totalmente injusto de jugar: Pases que no van donde quieres, faltas que no terminan de hacerse a pesar de que le HAS DADO al jugador, y todo por que el balón raramente está donde tu lo ves (el posicionamiento del servidor no está sincronizado con el resto de jugadores) La gente recomendó (de cual me incluyo) retrasar el lanzamiento del juego por que no estaba para salir completo, no lo hicieron y no solo eso, cada parche empeoraba más la experiencia de juego, eso si, las skins nuevas no faltan te van sacando unas cada cuantas semanas mientras que el juego es infumable... no hay comunicación por parte del equipo de desarrollo, meten parches si, pero con errores nuevos o con vueltas de errores que si se arreglaron... en fin ojalá sepan darle la vuelta a la situación por que si no me temo que el juego terminara por morir, cada vez son menos jugadores jugando. No recomiendo su compra, el día que el juego se pueda jugar cambiaré la reseña, si es que no lo cierran antes.

На выходе оставил положительный отзыв, однако сейчас понимаю, что разработчики так ничему и на научились со времён Absolver. 

Контента в игре кот наплакал. Скинчики добавляют раз в неделю (и-то не больше пяти штук за раз), а вот празднования после забитого гола или в конце игры - х1й да них1я. 

Баттл пас как оставался абсолютно бредовым, так и остался. Все самые интересные достижения в виде красивых скинов и анимаций залочены за временными рамками. Кто вообще, ёптыть, придумал лочить Баттл пас на три разных куска, которые открываются каждый месяц? Кто додумался, ёптыть, засунуть всё самое интересное в самый последний, третий, кусок?

У игры такой эбунячий потенциал... был, и они его всрали. Каждое новое обновление вроде что-то чинит, а вроде ничего и не меняется. Вроде проходит время после "большого" обновления, а вроде и все баги каким-то прэколом вернулись обратно, которые месяц назад починили. 

Не игра - а прэкол. Рекомендую к покупке тогда, когда выйдет "update #15", хотя бы. Вот только к тому времени играть в неё будут сами лишь разработчики.

[h1]サッカーとOWやVALORANTを足したようなゲーム[/h1]
ベータ版は約10時間程、アーリーアクセスからプレイ
ベータ時点で同接13万超えの新感覚サッカーゲーム。ルールはファール無し・オフサイド無し・タッチライン無しの
要は[b]"ボール持って走らなければ何でもアリ"[/b]というとってもシンプルなルール
3v3から5v5までのチーム戦で互いのステータスとは全く同じ、だからこそ問われるのは
[b]"プレイヤースキル×連携力"[/b]で、個人的にここがロケットリーグやチーム対戦型FPSに近い面白さがあると思う。ロケリが好きな人は絶対好き
そしてこのゲームの面白い所が主に2つあり、[b]「FPSゲームのようにエイムが重要」[/b]という所。
エイムによってゴールの端ギリッギリを狙ったり、キーパーの頭上を狙ったり、内側や外側にカーブをかけてシュートを決めたときは脳汁。
そして[b]「反射可能な壁」[/b]

Es ist ein erfrischendes und cooles Spiel – aber hier eine kleine Warnung für Interessierte:

Aktuell ist das Spiel noch etwas buggy und laggy, was für mich am Release-Tag keine große Überraschung ist. Deshalb sehe ich das derzeit nicht ganz so kritisch wie manch anderer.

Allerdings gibt es ein paar Punkte, die frustrieren können:

- Teammates können dein Verderben sein, besonders wenn du alleine (Solo Player) unterwegs bist und nicht in einer festen Gruppe spielst – ähnlich wie man es schon von Rocket League kennt.

-  Die Steuerung ist noch gewöhnungsbedürftig, da es aktuell (soweit ich weiß) keine Möglichkeit gibt, die Tastenbelegung anzupassen. Ich hoffe, das wird im Laufe der Zeit noch ins Spiel integriert.

Trotzdem: Ich mag das Spiel.
Zwischendurch mal ein bisschen mit ein paar Kollegen zu zocken, macht einfach Laune.

Was ich nicht nachvollziehen kann, ist dieser künstliche Hass auf das Spiel. Du musst es nicht mögen – völlig okay!
Aber warum man anderen den Spaß madig reden will, verstehe ich irgendwie nicht.

Impossível recomendar no momento. Jogo tá com o netcode cagado e muita dessincronização. Papo de ver gente pulando pra bola, teleportando com ela e fazendo os chutes desaparecerem pelo campo, como ela estivesse se teletransportando. Se você ainda não comprou a versão antecipada, NÃO COMPRE! Espere até os desenvolvedores arrumarem esses problemas ou aguarde até o lançamento do jogo, o hype não vai ser recompensado no momento atual.

Vale adicionar, o crossplay não está disponível nessa versão antecipada do jogo. É aparentemente impossível jogar com pessoas da PlayStation, Xbox ou até mesmo jogadores do Game Pass. Recomendo buscar mais informações no X oficial do Rematch, que fez essa mesmíssima declaração. Além disso, eu aproveitaria pra dar uma olhada na experiência geral do público e averiguar que, factualmente, o jogo está com diversos problemas nessa versão.

Viven en un country, andan en computadoras AlienWare para arriba, los fines de semana se compran los mejores componentes de CPU, morfan bien todos los días. El día anterior al partido, se sentaron tranquilamente en una silla gamer cinco estrellas y se rascaron la verrrrrrga durante veinticuatro horas sin hacer nada, jugando al fifa, al fortnite y a la Play. Juegan videojuegos todos los días de su vida. ¿Los controles? 6000 dólares, 5000 pe… no sé cuánto salen, ponele 3000 mangos, 4000 mangos. 

Están estables por una conexión perfecta de internet, están bien comidos, están bien entrenados, los procesadores; que son las que no te cortan los frame rates, las pantallas; que son los que no te raspan los colores, la refrigeración; es la que te estira todo el sistema, la que no sobrecalienta, la que sale a 800 pesos… ¡No sé cuánto sale un ventilador para jugar a los jueguitos!

 ¡La pelota es perfecta, PERFECTA! 120 poligonos. Procesada con un modelo 3D a 8 bares. La cancha no tiene un solo bug, el arco tiene siete metros, veinte por dos cuarenta renderizado. Te aplauden las animaciones cuando salís a la cancha… 

¡LA CONCHA DE TU MADRE NO SABÉS PASAR UNA PELOTA! LE VAS A PEGAR AL ARCO Y DESDE EL PUNTO PENAL, LA TIRÁS A LA MIERDA. Le vas a hacer un pase a tu compañero que está a un metro y la haces así y se la pasas mal, te ponés la skin de Ronaldinho y ni regatear un palo parado sabes. Hijo de puta, eso me puede pasar a mí con esta computadora de mierda, pero no a vos. Y vos, otro boludo, que vas y le pagás el acceso anticipado, como un pelotudo y te cagás de frío de dinero y decís: "dale me”, “dale xi”, dale co”, “dale tri”, e' putooo, boludo soy re pija porque voy a la tienda de steam.

reviews.review: Спасибо за дисконнект каждые 40 секунд, очень классно можно поиграть, разрабы не дауны. Не покупайте эту залупу в данный момент.

Rematch is a fun game with a lot of potential. The core gameplay is enjoyable and shows promise but unfortunately, it feels more like a playtest than a finished product.

There are several frustrating bugs that really hurt the experience: 
- Sometimes the controller stops responding entirely, and switching to mouse and keyboard doesn’t help you just can’t move. 
- The ball and player physics also need serious work. The ball occasionally goes right through your hands, making the game feel inconsistent and unfair.
- Sometimes the game just crashes
- Achievement bugs

Please add 3v3 and 4v4 competitive and an option to text chat instead of speech chat. Also give an option to report players who are being toxic or playing like they are the only one in the team cause it’s frustrating as f***

I’m rooting for this game, but it needs some urgent polish. Once the major bugs are fixed and some wishes fulfilled Rematch could really shine.

Играл в две беты, терпел все вылеты — ведь это всё ещё бета. Думал, на релизе пофиксят, но нет: они выпускают сырую игру, которая вылетает каждые 7 голов. Так ещё и не пофиксили рассинхрон. Игра сама по себе затягивает геймплеем, но с технической стороны — полное ♥♥♥♥♥♥.

поиграть все таки смог, но думаю понятно как. Ёще с бетки почти ниче не поменялось. Добавили косметику за деньги, исправили баг с пасом в начале (теперь персонажа не колбасит). Забавно что иногда вроде мяч разводит твоя команда и вдруг мяч резко оказывается у противоположной и они уже летят на ворота пока ты пытаешься понять куда он телепортировался. Игра хорошая, меня затягивает ужасно, но эти сервера... Вроде играешь все норм и резко игра намертво встаёт и вылетает. Остаётся надеятся что разрабы че нить придумают. (хотя мне страшно подумать что будет когда игру получат все кто предзаказ делал, там вщ игра ляжет походу)

Why pass when you can shine? This isn’t “Football Team Simulator 2025,” it’s Your Time to Dominate™. You’re the main character, the rest are just NPCs in your highlight reel.

Dribbling through five defenders and losing the ball? That’s called flair. Ignoring open teammates? That’s vision, your goal, your glory. You’re not being selfish, you’re just showing them how it's done.

Goalkeeper sprinting across the field to take a shot? That’s called initiative. Long shots from your own half? Alpha plays. If they wanted to touch the ball, they should’ve spawned as you.

Yes, it’s a team game, but let’s be real: you are the team.

As of 07.07.2025

As someone who played all the beta tests and has been following the game since the first reveal trailer:

- I give this game 6 months before it becomes free-to-play, and then another year or so before complete server shutdown. -

Instead of partnering with Puma, Ronaldinho, and all the other unnecessary promotional deals, the developers should focus on core improvements:

Better UX and UI design

Clear progression feedback

Matchmaking improvements

Full control remapping (having to move the mouse to pass is a ridiculous approach)

A proper report and ban system

Fixing customization bugs that appear during matches

Adding more content, both in gameplay and customization

Passing needs to be fixed — it currently requires too much precision and skill to execute properly. Because of this, players avoid passing altogether and just try to score instead.

Not being able to remap controls a month after release is a joke.

You claim that restricting jersey color selection is to maintain visibility, fine. But then why do I get matched wearing an all-black jersey against a team in a very dark red? How is that good visibility?

Recommendation:
I would only recommend this game to people who really like the concept and have friends to play with. Both are required to get even a small amount of enjoyment out of it. Otherwise, wait for a sale or for the game to go free-to-play.

UPDATE: 30.07.2025

One and a half months have passed since launch. The game received one major update that fixed some issues but introduced new ones (which will probably take another 1.5 months to fix, and the cycle will continue).

Sometimes my player doesn’t interact with the ball at all for an entire match.

The “center to the middle and 50/50 into a blade shot” meta is still dominant.

Indie studios really shouldn’t attempt online multiplayer games. Unlucky.

My prediction: the game will be dead by next June, so don’t bother buying it.

UPDATE: 19.08.2025

Still no meaningful updates. Every major issue remains.

Only minor HUD changes were implemented, and even that took this long. We’re still waiting for previous issues to be addressed.

And this is just fixes we’re talking about. There should also be seasonal content, events, game modes, and daily challenges—but none of those are anywhere close.

My estimate remains: free-to-play in December, server shutdown on the one-year anniversary.

UPDATE and Final Note: 24.08.2025

1. Lack of Development & Critical Fixes

The dev team failed to deliver any meaningful new content since launch.

Even urgent, core-level fixes—bugs, code optimization, and essential hotfixes—have been neglected.

2. Shallow & Frustrating Gameplay Loop

The game quickly falls into a repetitive meta: hoofing the ball into the opponent’s penalty box and relying on RNG 50/50 animations to score.

Goalkeepers can’t realistically save close-range shots, making the mechanic feel broken.

Passing is unreliable due to poor positioning and awareness; teammates often dribble and lose the ball.

Defense feels unbalanced—players resort to chasing opponents for tackles, but any slightly skilled player can bypass this easily and you just end up relying on your other teammates that stay in the enemy penalty box, waiting for your goalkeeper to save and hoof the ball to them.

3. Slow Updates & Lack of Content

Minor bug/UI fixes and a few cosmetics have taken over a month each to release.

In 2.5 months since launch, there are no new events, modes, challenges, or crossplay—essential features for an online game.

Player count has plummeted drastically. At this pace, the game risks going free-to-play by Christmas and potentially shutting down within a year unless major changes happen.

Current experience feels shallow and boring; no incentive to keep playing.

Bottom Line:
This game had potential, but the lack of updates, stale gameplay, and absent support make it hard to recommend. Without immediate, substantial changes, the future looks grim.

Вы поменяли анимации, они в чём-то стали более плавными и предсказуемыми, спасибо, но в то же время начали появляться просто невообразимые анимации с мячом, который сразу может быть в 3х метрах от модельки персонажа и в 0,5 секунды притягиваться к игроку, что прочитать просто невозможно. Ожидания были совсем другие, думал, что здесь ребята с таким же энтузиазмом, как например, Фейспанч, а на деле... бездушное обновление магазина с косметикой))) Хоть и нравится игра, пока что дизлайк. Стоит начать с того, что я наиграл достаточное количество времени, чтобы сделать хоть какие-то выводы. Имея 77 уровень учетной записи, 400 сыгранных матчей и 515 забитых голов в них, играя в игру каждый день с момента ее релиза по предварительному доступу 16 июня.
Начнем с положительных сторон этой игры - она великолепная и интересная. Это именно тот глоток свежего воздуха, который был нужен многим игрокам в компетитив игры, которые устали от однотипных проектов. У игры огромный потенциал благодаря уникальным механикам и возможности их комбинировать, что придает зрелищности каждому игровому моменту, что заставляет играть дальше. Игра позволяет делать хайлайты, за которые мы так любим игры, в которых мы играем против других игроков, но в игре все еще слишком много ощутимых минусов, которые, как по мне, не позволят игрокам надолго в ней задержаться, хотя безусловно свою аудиторию игра найдет, но вряд-ли эта аудитория будет стремительно расширяться.

Теперь о минусах:

Награда.
Как по мне, основной минус на данный момент - отсутствие какой либо мотивации для игроков. есть скудненький батлпас, разделенный на 3 части, каждая из которых открывается с задержкой в месяц после предыдущей. 
Многие игроки, как и я, купив батлпас, зарабатывая награды его открытия, хотят получить награды, а не ждать месяц того, что их откроют. Какой в этом смысл, если, когда их откроют, я получу их все за один день?

Рейтинг.
Мотивация может выражаться не только в косметически предметах, дающих игрокам возможность выделяться на фоне остальных, но в и ранге, так называемом признании личного скила, но и с этим игра имеет серьезную проблему.
В игре доступен рейтинговый режим только 5 на 5, игра в котором сводится к тому, что побеждает фуллпати игроков, играющих вместе и сидящих в дискорде. Огромное количество соло игроков не сможет поднимать ранг в таком режиме, пока не найдет пати из 5 человек, что сделать достаточно проблематично. 

Отсутствие контента.
Я имел возможность поиграть в игру и на бета тесте в мае. Спустя полтора месяца в игре не появилось фактически ничего, кроме скина Рональдиньо и Стегена. Никаких новых режимов, косметики для обычных людей, новых механик, рейтинг для режимов 3х3 4х4, нормальных наград за уровень или чего либо угодно, что заставило бы хотеть заходить в эту игру. Со временем каждый заход в игру становится таким же, как и предыдущий. Игра надоедает и приедается. Слишком мало контента, который бы хоть как-то вносил разнообразие в игровой процесс. Нет ничего, что заставляло бы тебя фармить, достаточно было бы минимальной системы заданий с простенькими наградами, где игроку требовалось бы забить 3 мяча/сделать 2 перехвата/поймать 1 мяч на воротах (нужное подчеркнуть), но даже такого здесь нет. Разработчики не вводят обновления, они добавляют косметику, которой тоже мало и она в большинстве своем ужасна. Сыграв 10 матчей в игру вы убедитесь в этом, увидев что все игроки из катки в катку выглядят одинаково.

Цена.
Это самое страшное, как по мне. Что пугало меня на старте, а с тенденцией падения онлайна, которую я вижу сейчас, пугает еще больше. Компетитив игра не может стоить столько денег. Есть огромное количество игр, которые являются примерами качественной и правильной монетизации своего продукта - качественная косметика или же платный режим и бесплатный режим игры. но в Rematch мы имеем игру минимальный прайс на которую составляет (введите значение подходящее для вашего региона). Нет даже разницы, где вы покупаете эту игру - она везде дорогая и в СНГ регионах это ощущается особенно сильно. Игра, которая хочет чтобы в нее играли и проводили турниры обязана быть бесплатная или иметь адекватную стоимость. Разработчик этим буквально закрывает вход для потенциально сильных игроков перекрывая дыхание любым зачаткам киберспорта, которые могли бы быть.

Пинг.
Малое количество серверов в европе продемонстрирует что такое важность пинга в этой игре. Чем больше вы будете играть, тем чаще вы будете видеть подтверждения этому. Пинг в этой игре очень важен, ведь именно благодаря ему вы будете видеть, как мяч не выбился из ног противника или он достал до него раньше вас. но к сожалению эта проблема тоже не решается в данный момент.

Подбивая итоги, мне игра очень понравилась, но быстро приелась. Перестану ли я в нее играть - вряд ли, но могу ли я ее советовать другим - скорее всего нет. На данном этапе играет требует кардинальных изменений и поддержки со стороны разработчиков. Игру нужно развивать. Смотреть на проблемы, которые есть сейчас и думать над их решением. У игры огромный потенциал и я бы очень хотел, чтобы эта игра в дальнейшем стала лучше и заняла достойное место среди конкурентов.

Полный провал. Запросить 12к, чтобы дать пользователям поиграть пораньше. В итоге сплошное расстройство, буду делать возврат.

Ignore all of the negative reviews, its expected that this game will have mixed or mostly positive reviews not because game is bad, but because players are too bad at the game, so they rage quit and try to trash the game.

Many complain about crashes while they have old drivers, many complain about servers when they have set region location to auto(auto does not mean best servers it means fastest queue)

are there bugs? YES, the game just released, they cant fix every single bug instantly... its stupid to leave bad reviews just because of bugs, there exists "report bugs" ya know?

game is really really fun thats all you need to know, if you are a bad player 1. learn the game 2. just dont play it, stop blaming the game.

Also, many people complain about servers i said the reason, but note that the game requires very good internet, lower ping will always take the most interactions.... thats just how online games work, it does not really matter in fortnite, cs2, but here ping matters a lot(obviously in those games ping matters too, but in those games i can play with 60-100 ping without me even noticing a thing) here as i said, if you have high ping, dont buy the game, you wont have fun, i also have high ping, but its manageable for me, last couple of games i got 10k+ points, so if you know how to play even high ping can be neglected.

Anyways, game is not perfect, but that does not mean its bad... out of 10 it easily gets 8.5 and in future it WILL get better.

[h1]🏆 Rating: 10/10[/h1]

REMATCH, developed by Sloclap, brings a fresh take on sports gaming by blending dynamic action with deep team cooperation. Instead of aiming for realism, the game delivers intense 5v5 matches where each player controls a single character from a third-person perspective. There are no fouls, offsides, or corners—just pure football fun.

[h1]🎮 Gameplay: Football Reimagined[/h1]
REMATCH focuses on individual skills within a team environment. Each match lasts about 6 minutes, with teams of 3 to 5 players. Gamers control one character, switching positions—including the goalkeeper—throughout the match. Traditional rules like fouls and offsides are gone, resulting in fast-paced, uninterrupted action.

Controls are precise—players aim and perform passes or shots manually, which demands excellent coordination and reflexes. The matches take place in closed arenas, enabling creative plays like bouncing the ball off walls.

[h1]🌍 Game World: A Utopian Future[/h1]
Set in the year 2065, REMATCH unfolds in a world that has undergone ecological and social transformation. The stadiums are thematically linked to various forms of renewable energy. Visually, the game blends elements of French impressionism with the artistic flair of titles like Breath of the Wild.

[h1]🎨 Aesthetics & Sound: Stylish Energy[/h1]
The game stands out with its colorful, stylized graphics that are both clear and visually appealing. Character animations are smooth, and ball physics feel realistic, enhancing immersion. Sound and music dynamically respond to the intensity of the match, elevating the emotional experience.

[h1]🧩 Customization & Progression[/h1]
REMATCH offers extensive character customization—ranging from outfits to goal celebration animations. The progression system unlocks new cosmetic items, encouraging continued play. Importantly, the absence of pay-to-win mechanics ensures a fair competitive environment focused on player skill.

[h1]🧠 Final Thoughts[/h1]
REMATCH redefines what a sports game can be, combining intense action with strategic teamwork. With its innovative gameplay, distinct aesthetic, and inclusive design, it offers a unique experience in the sports gaming scene. For me personally, it brings back memories of watching Galactic Football as a kid—a show full of energy, team spirit, and futuristic sporting vision.

[h1]🏆 Rating: 10/10[/h1]
REMATCH merges football passion with a modern approach to video games. With its dynamic gameplay, strong team mechanics, and unique visual identity, it earns a perfect score.

Really fun game. Super fast-paced, scoring feels great, and dribbling + goalkeeping are surprisingly smooth.
Way better with friends — 3v3, 4v4, 5v5 matches are a blast.
The graphics are clean and futuristic. Easy to pick up, but stays fun for a long time.
Servers had issues during beta, but now it runs well.
💵 Price is okay, though $5–10 would feel more fair.
⚽ Feels like a cool “on-foot” alternative to Rocket League.

Rating: 4/10 — absolutely worth trying, especially with friends.
To all football enjoyers: 100% recommended.
